name: ai-talent-regulation
topic: tech companies competing for AI talent while lobbying for regulation

rubrics: Facts should keep talent-market competition and regulatory lobbying as distinct but interacting domains.
Facts should identify the concrete incentives, constraints, and policy signals that shape each domain.
Facts should avoid collapsing hiring pressure, policy advocacy, and product strategy into one storyline.
Facts should stay anchored in specific actors or moves rather than generic AI-industry commentary.
